---
title: "test_security_scan_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_security_scan_empire.py"
loc: 24
complexity: 1
logic_score: 4.60
style_score: 3.89
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.33
---

## Intent
The `test_security_scan_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_security_scanner_dangerous_code, test_security_scanner_obfuscation, test_security_scanner_safe. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_security_scanner_dangerous_code, test_security_scanner_obfuscation, test_security_scanner_safe. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.tools.security_scan](file://src.tools.security_scan)

### Exports
- `test_security_scanner_dangerous_code`
- `test_security_scanner_obfuscation`
- `test_security_scanner_safe`
